title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
